View this page

ODE and DAE API¶

Symbolic ordinary and differential-algebraic equation systems.

ODE¶

class alkahest.ODE¶

An ordinary differential equation system.

Stores state variables, their time derivatives as symbolic expressions, and the independent variable:

pool = ExprPool()
t = pool.symbol("t")
x = pool.symbol("x")
v = pool.symbol("v")

# Harmonic oscillator: x'' + ω²x = 0 → first-order system
ode = ODE(
    state=[x, v],
    derivatives=[v, pool.integer(-1) * x],
    independent=t,
)
alkahest.lower_to_first_order(ode: ODE) → ODE¶

Convert a higher-order ODE to first-order form by introducing new state variables for each derivative.

DAE¶

class alkahest.DAE¶

A differential-algebraic equation system mixing differential equations with algebraic constraints.

alkahest.pantelides(dae: DAE) → DAE¶

Apply the Pantelides algorithm for structural index reduction.

Identifies which equations must be differentiated to make the system structurally regular (index 1). Returns the reduced DAE with the differentiated equations added as symbolic expressions.

Returns:

A reduced DAE with .index and .differentiated attributes.

Sensitivity analysis¶

alkahest.sensitivity_system(ode: ODE, params: list[Expr]) → SensitivitySystem¶

Generate the forward sensitivity equations alongside the ODE.

For each parameter p in params, adds equations for ∂x/∂p to the system.

alkahest.adjoint_system(ode: ODE, output: Expr, params: list[Expr]) → object¶

Generate the adjoint sensitivity equations (reverse-mode AD for ODEs).

More efficient than forward sensitivity when there are many parameters and a scalar output.

class alkahest.SensitivitySystem¶

The extended ODE with sensitivity equations attached.

Acausal modeling¶

class alkahest.AcausalSystem¶

An acausal component model. Components are added via add() and connected via connect(). The system is compiled to a DAE via to_dae().

add(component) → None¶

Add a component to the system.

connect(port_a: Port, port_b: Port) → None¶

Connect two component ports.

to_dae() → DAE¶

Assemble the component equations into a DAE.

class alkahest.Port¶

A connection port on a component (e.g. positive/negative terminals of a resistor).

alkahest.resistor(pool: ExprPool, resistance: Expr) → object¶

Create a resistor component with the given resistance expression.

Hybrid systems¶

class alkahest.HybridODE¶

An ODE with discrete events. At each event crossing, the state is reset and integration resumes.

class alkahest.Event¶

A hybrid system event.

Parameters:

  • condition – Expression; event fires when this crosses zero.

  • reset – Dict mapping state variables to their post-event values.
